text: Requesting prior authorization for a lumbar spine MRI for member NH-102394 with chronic low back pain radiating to the left leg. Attached: referring physician order, eight weeks of documented physical therapy notes, neurological exam documenting L5 radiculopathy.
PA request for a brain MRI for member NH-284617 with new-onset seizures. Attached: neurologist order, EEG report showing focal epileptiform activity, emergency department discharge summary.

PA request for adalimumab (Humira) for member NH-390215 with moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis. Attached: rheumatologist order, documentation of six months of methotrexate with inadequate response, negative TB screening.

PA request for knee arthroscopy for member NH-417802 with a medial meniscal tear confirmed on MRI. Attached: orthopedic surgeon order, MRI report, twelve weeks of documented conservative therapy (physical therapy and NSAIDs).
PA request for a CPAP device for member NH-523901 with obstructive sleep apnea. Attached: in-lab polysomnography showing AHI of 32, physician order, sleep specialist consultation notes.

Urgent PA request for a contrast CT of the abdomen for member NH-608453 with right lower quadrant pain, fever and elevated white blood cell count. Attached: emergency physician order and laboratory results.

PA request for continuation of insulin pump supplies for member NH-711248 with type 1 diabetes on insulin pump therapy for four years. Attached: endocrinologist order, HbA1c history, downloaded pump and glucose logs.

PA request for cataract extraction with intraocular lens implant, right eye, for member NH-802355. Attached: ophthalmologist order, best corrected visual acuity 20/70, documentation of impaired daily activities due to glare.
PA request for a front-wheeled walker for member NH-914520 following total hip replacement. Attached: physician order and inpatient physical therapy discharge note documenting gait instability.

PA request for etanercept (Enbrel) for member NH-105872 with severe plaque psoriasis covering 15% of body surface area. Attached: dermatologist order, documented failure of topical corticosteroids and phototherapy, negative TB screening.

PA request for a transesophageal echocardiogram for member NH-118437 with newly diagnosed atrial fibrillation prior to planned cardioversion. Attached: cardiologist order and ECG confirming atrial fibrillation.

PA request for twelve home health physical therapy visits for member NH-129604 recovering from an ischemic stroke. Attached: hospital discharge plan, physiatrist order, functional assessment documenting right-sided hemiparesis.
PA request for a diagnostic colonoscopy for member NH-133781, age 52, with a positive FIT stool test. Attached: gastroenterologist order and FIT laboratory report.

PA request for semaglutide (Ozempic) 0.5 mg weekly for member NH-146092 with type 2 diabetes. Attached: physician order, diagnosis confirmation, HbA1c 8.4% drawn 2026-06-20, documentation of metformin intolerance.

PA request for a right shoulder MRI for member NH-152318 with rotator cuff pain for three months. Attached: orthopedic physician order and clinical examination notes. Conservative therapy notes are not included with this submission.

supplemental: Physical therapy progress notes covering eight weeks of completed conservative treatment with persistent symptoms, and an orthopedic re-evaluation recommending MRI

text: PA request for dupilumab (Dupixent) for member NH-167429 with severe atopic dermatitis. Attached: dermatologist order and diagnosis confirmation. Records of prior topical therapy are not attached.

supplemental: Treatment history documenting failure of high-potency topical corticosteroids and calcineurin inhibitors

text: PA request for a semi-electric hospital bed for member NH-171065 with advanced COPD requiring positional breathing support at home. Attached: home health nurse assessment. The signed physician order has not yet been received.

supplemental: Signed physician order for a semi-electric hospital bed with medical necessity statement

text: PA request for laparoscopic sleeve gastrectomy for member NH-183947 with BMI 42, hypertension and obstructive sleep apnea. Attached: surgeon order and six months of supervised weight-management program records. The psychological evaluation is not included.

supplemental: Pre-surgical psychological evaluation with clearance for bariatric surgery

text: PA request for a Group 2 power wheelchair for member NH-195023 with multiple sclerosis and severe lower-extremity weakness. Attached: physician order only; the specialty mobility evaluation and the home accessibility assessment are not included.

supplemental: Occupational therapy mobility evaluation documenting inability to self-propel a manual wheelchair
Home accessibility assessment confirming the residence accommodates a power wheelchair, and the physician face-to-face mobility examination note

text: PA request for infliximab (Remicade) for member NH-208114 with fistulizing Crohn's disease. Attached: gastroenterologist order and colonoscopy report. TB screening results and prior conventional therapy documentation are not attached.

supplemental: Treatment history documenting failure of azathioprine and budesonide, with current disease-activity laboratory results

text: PA request for bilateral upper blepharoplasty for member NH-214569 to improve the tired appearance of the eyes. Attached: plastic surgeon consultation notes and photographs. No visual field testing is provided; the stated goal is cosmetic improvement.

PA request for an experimental autologous stem-cell injection protocol for member NH-226803 with knee osteoarthritis. Attached: regenerative medicine clinic brochure and a physician letter describing the investigational protocol.

PA request for bilateral LASIK refractive surgery for member NH-231750 to eliminate dependence on eyeglasses. Attached: ophthalmology consultation notes with refraction measurements. The member has healthy eyes fully correctable with eyeglasses and requests the elective procedure for lifestyle convenience.
PA request for a twelve-month fitness club membership for member NH-247216, recommended by their physician for general weight management and wellness. Attached: physician recommendation letter.
PA request for a stationary home oxygen concentrator for member NH-259038 with chronic shortness of breath. No qualifying oximetry study and no physician order are attached.

supplemental: Patient-reported symptom diary describing breathlessness during household chores
Photograph of a drugstore pulse oximeter reading SpO2 95% at rest

text: PA request for a whole-body PET/CT for member NH-262984 submitted by the ordering office; the clinical indication is not stated. No physician notes, pathology results or staging information are attached.

supplemental: Fax cover sheet from the ordering office restating the request
Appointment scheduling confirmation without clinical content

text: PA request for a cervical spine MRI for member NH-274301 with neck pain radiating to the right arm for five weeks. Attached: physician order and notes documenting four weeks of NSAIDs and home exercises; formal physical therapy has not yet been completed.

supplemental: Physical therapy progress notes covering two additional weeks of supervised treatment

text: PA request for off-label low-dose naltrexone for member NH-286457 with fibromyalgia refractory to duloxetine and pregabalin. Attached: physician order, treatment history, and two peer-reviewed studies supporting the off-label use.

PA request for bilateral reduction mammaplasty for member NH-292610 with chronic upper back and shoulder pain. Attached: surgeon consultation, documentation of six months of conservative pain management, photographs. Estimated resection weight is near the coverage threshold.
PA request for a continuous glucose monitor for member NH-305178 with type 2 diabetes on basal insulin only. Attached: physician order and HbA1c 8.9%. Self-monitoring glucose logs are not attached.

supplemental: Fingerstick glucose logs showing two daily checks over the past month
